sourceSelector.emptyDescription: If you just granted screen recording permission, reload this picker. On macOS you may need to reopen OpenScreen.
sourceSelector.loadFailedDescription: OpenScreen could not load capture sources. Reload this picker and try again.

recording.selectSource: Please select a source to record

recordingSettings.title: Settings

trayLayout.label: Vertical tray
trayLayout.description: Stack HUD controls vertically instead of horizontally.

excludeTaskbar.label: Exclude taskbar
excludeTaskbar.description: When recording a display, capture only the work area without the taskbar.

windowPadding.label: Window capture padding
windowPadding.description: Extra pixels to include around a selected window on each side.

recordingSettings.nativeOnlyHint: These options apply to native Windows capture.

systemLanguagePrompt.title: Use your system language?
systemLanguagePrompt.description: We detected {{language}} as your system language. Do you want to switch OpenScreen to {{language}}?
